de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Class LinkedHashMap<K,V>

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.util.AbstractMap<K,V>
      • java.util.HashMap<K,V>
        • java.util.LinkedHashMap<K,V>
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.LinkedHashMap<K,V>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Cloneable, java.lang.Iterable<Pair<K,V>>, java.util.Map<K,V>
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    ReplacementMap.DefaultReplacementMap

    public class LinkedHashMap<K,V>
extends java.util.LinkedHashMap<K,V>
implements java.lang.Iterable<Pair<K,V>>
